title: mentha × rotundifolia subsp. timija
intro: Mentha × rotundifolia subsp. timija, also known as Indian mint or pudina, is a subspecies of the mint plant that is native to the Western Ghats region of India. It possesses medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Mentha × rotundifolia subsp. timija include aiding digestion, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its numerous health benefits.
